title: Synthetic Data Generation
description: Utilize Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) or statistical modeling for creating synthetic datasets. Implement methods to preserve the mathematical utility of original PII in synthetic data for testing and AI training.
objectives: Utilize Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) or statistical modeling for creating synthetic datasets.
Implement methods to preserve the mathematical utility of original PII in synthetic data for testing and AI training.
